'''IG-138''' was an [[IG-100 MagnaGuard/Legends|IG-100 MagnaGuard]] who helped [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]]
train in [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]].

During a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] training session witnessed by [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], Grievous cut both IG-138 and [[IG-109]] to pieces.

{{Droid-stub}}
